description_long: This fire hydrant is a cylindrical, robust object with a domed top and a wide circular base, all rendered in a uniform red color. It features two prominent side outlets for hose connections, each protruding horizontally from the main body, and a central front outlet with a raised circular detail. The top of the hydrant is capped with a rounded dome, which likely houses the operating nut or cap for valve access. The base is thick and slightly flared, providing stability when installed on urban streets or sidewalks. The surface appears smooth and hard, typical of cast metal hydrants, with no visible manufacturer markings or decorative elements. There are no chains or additional attachments visible on the outlets.
description: A red, cylindrical fire hydrant with a domed top, two side outlets, and a central front outlet, all with a smooth, hard surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a raised circular detail and both side outlets visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right side outlet and the domed top, with the central outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the cylindrical body and both side outlets, with the central outlet not visible.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the left side outlet and the domed top, with the central outlet partially visible.
